I was recently laid off from my truck driver job with Pepsi. Even though I was the driver of the year, they go by seniority. I was so embarrassed to tell my family, now I'm studding several hours per day (7days p/ week) and starting to be profitable, however not consistent. Some days I lose $50, and yesterday I made $2300, most days I make between $200-$300. My goal is to never have to work for anyone again.😃🙏

I like how he uses RSI extremes only when price is sitting at real support or resistance instead of treating every 30/70 print as a trade. Adding that candle confirmation makes it feel a lot less random and more like you’re trading structure. I’ve been using the first light beacon with a similar focus on order flow and key zones, and it lines up really well with this kind of reversal logic. This is a good reminder that RSI works best when it’s tied to where price is, not just the reading itself.

But during strong moves RSI can go from oversold to extremely oversold or from overbought to extremely overbought and the prices change significantly keeping RSI in extreme zone. It's not so simple. You need another filter to choose when to enter positions because buying only because RSI is <30, can lead to significant losses during situations like e.g. Covid crash or Trump's tariffs in April.
